final:
module top_module
(
    input clk,
    input preset,
    input enable,
    input [3:0] preset_val,
    output reg [3:0] count
);always @(posedge clk or posedge preset)
        if (preset) begin
            count <= preset_val;
        end else if (enable) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count - 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
